name: gameobject-modify
title: GameObject / Modify
description: Modify GameObject fields and properties in opened Prefab or in a Scene. You can modify multiple GameObjects at once. Just provide the same number of GameObject references and SerializedMember objects.

parameters.name: gameObjectRefs
parameters.description: Array of GameObjectRef to modify. SCHEMA: [{"name":"ObjectName"}] or [{"instanceID":12345}]

parameters.name: gameObjectDiffs
parameters.description: Array of diffs (same length as gameObjectRefs). SCHEMA: [{"props":[{"name":"tag","value":"EditorOnly"}]}]

commonMistakes: Parameters are gameObjectRefs + gameObjectDiffs, NOT gameObjectRef + modifications
